name: content-engine
description: Content repurposing engine that atomizes source content into typed insight units and reassembles them into platform-native adaptations across Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram, Threads, Blog/SEO, Email, YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Reddit, HN, Product Hunt, and Korean platforms (Naver, Kakao). Supports bidirectional flow (long→short and short→long), voice calibration, drip scheduling, and content calendar planning.
